utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet !

emotion_cause.span: 1_Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet ! Not yet !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am great ! I am great . I have got a great job at Bloomingdale’s , have wonderful friends , and even though I’m not seeing anyone right now , I’ve never felt better about myself .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am great ! I am great . I have got a great job at Bloomingdale’s , have wonderful friends , and even though I’m not seeing anyone right now , I’ve never felt better about myself .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: She will be out in a second . So , Chip , how umm , Amy Welch ?

utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: Amy Welch ? Wow ! I have not seen her since ... So , Monica about ready ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_Amy Welch ? Wow ! I have not seen her since ...
